mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS roomId, r.room_no AS roomNo, f.id AS floorId, f.floor_name AS floorName, b.id AS buildingId, b.building_name AS buildingName FROM elder_room r LEFT JOIN elder_floor f ON f.id = r.floor_id LEFT JOIN elder_building b ON b.id = r.building_id WHERE r.del_flag = 0 AND r.project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT be.id as bedId, be.bed_no as bedNo, r.id AS roomId, r.room_no AS roomNo, f.id AS floorId, f.floor_name AS floorName, b.id AS buildingId, b.building_name AS buildingName FROM elder_bed be LEFT JOIN elder_room r on r.id = be.room_id LEFT JOIN elder_floor f ON f.id = r.floor_id LEFT JOIN elder_building b ON b.id = r.building_id WHERE be.del_flag = 0 AND be.project_id = #{projectId}
